title: WrasseRegistryEntry
description: Wrasse Scribe registry entry — pre-resolved trigger for agent-spawn boundary injection. K540/B132.

type.description: Set to 'header' for first-line registry header only

trigger_regex.description: Regex string for first-pass match against session context (case-insensitive). Anchored to avoid false positives.

canonical_resolution.description: Full text resolution that replaces the need for rote-derivation. Should be concise but complete.

verification_count.description: Number of times this resolution has been verified correct across sessions

source_session.description: Session that sourced this entry (e.g. K540, B132)

provisional_15_candidate.description: True if this entry is reduction-to-practice for Provisional 15 claims
